{{Quote|Don't think Fingal. You aren't properly equipped for it.|Governor [[Raccyx Staffa|Staffa]] to Fingal|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Fingal''' was a small [[Berchestian]] [[Gender/Legends|man]] who worked overtly as an aide in [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Raccyx Staffa|Staffa's]] office, and covertly as a spy for [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Biography==
Stationed on [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]] for almost a decade, he had a trade relationship with Governor Staffa for some time. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] collapsed, he thought his service was over. However, he was reactivated by Thrawn, and he reported to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] that [[Talon Karrde]] had met [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] there on Berchest.
